body_p1: When my unit deployed to Iraq, I deployed as the only dual-qualified Mission Crew Commander on the EC-130H Compass Call airframe. That wasn't a title — it was a weight.
body_p2: Every sortie we flew depended on my expertise and my decisions. There was no one else. I owned it.
body_p3: On the ground, my squadron commander tapped me as Chief of Security — responsible for information security, operational security, and personnel security for the entire unit. I managed top secret clearance upgrades and led five airmen to the same standard I held in the air.
blockquote: Always delivered better than expected. Led from the front. Gave her time to others freely.

credentials.label: Airmen led as Chief of Security
